content.en:
"Where is it?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Time Firm. "

The Frostless Lord said.

"Time Firm?" Ye Tian didn't know much about this firm, so he waited for the introduction of the Frostless Lord.

The Frostless Lord said: "The Time Merchant House is a Merchant House established by the Eternal Controller, of course this is a rumor, but many forces have acquiesced, because a long time ago, a peak Legendary Realm Lord who offended the Time Merchant was killed silently after a long time. So, the Eternal Master is probably true. But now, it is not very clear which timeline the eternal master is in, but even in the distant future timeline, he will still come into contact with the other party after all, if he really offends the Time Firm, there will be no good end in the future, so the authority of the Time Dealer in the Void Region Many Eternal Seas is still "one-three-three" is still very high, and no Legendary Realm Lord will offend the Time Firm. The Time Merchant spans many eternal seas, so if you go to the Time Firm, you may be lucky enough to find those three treasures. "

"Thank you, Lord Frostless, for your advice. "

Ye Tian thanked.

Subsequently, he left the True Void Holy Land and prepared to go to the Time Firm.

Time Merchant is distributed in many Eternal Seas, but those weak Eternal Seas do not have branches of Time Merchants, because Time Traders take high-end routes, and the items they trade are at least at the level of Legendary Lords.

Some weak Eternal Seas, there are not even many Legendary Lords, and there is no need to establish a branch at all

And the Infinite Sea is still very powerful, so it has a branch of the Time Merchant Bank.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the Time Trading Company.

The Time Merchant House is not built on the Infinite Island, but is built on the Infinite Sea's Ocean of Origin Energy, floating on it.

The Time Merchant House is very large, and Ye Tian came to the Time Merchant House and found that the Time Merchant House was formed by combining a variety of eternal treasures.

A branch is actually constructed with the superposition of eternal treasures, which shows how rich and wealthy the time trading bank is.

Ye Tian entered the Time Merchant House and saw many Legendary Lords, most of the customers here were at the two levels of Realm Legendary Lords and Transcendent Realm Legendary Lords, and the Legendary Lords with low cultivation did not have enough financial resources to buy treasures when they came here, so there were very few Legendary Lords under the Realm Legendary Lords, and the treasures needed by the half-step Legendary Realm Lords were also very rare, and even the Legendary Realm Lords did not necessarily have them.

Therefore, the Half-Step Legendary Realm Lord rarely comes to the Time Dealer, unless there are treasures that are of great use to the Half-Step Legendary Realm here, so that the Half-Step Legendary Realm Lord can be attracted to come.

The employees of the Time Merchant are all Legendary Lords.Maybe many of the employees are just ordinary Legendary Lords, but no one dares to underestimate them, and even the Legendary Lords of Days want to become employees of the Time Merchants, they don't have any habits.

It doesn't have anything to do with it, and you can't enter the company at all.

Once you join the Time Firm, you have a big backer, and almost no one dares to touch the employees of the Time Firm.

However, the Time Firm is almost always recruited from within, after all, for countless years, there are also a large number of cultivators within the Time Firm, and it is naturally easy to give birth to some Legendary Lords.

Ye Tian came to the Time Firm, and soon a female employee came to receive him, this female employee was the Legendary Lord of the Origin Realm.

"This guest, you should be coming to the Time Firm for the first time, you can come to our Firm to register an account. Our account is so secret that even the Lords of the Legendary Realm cannot interfere with your account. "

The female employee said.

Ye Tian didn't feel strange that he was discovered when he first arrived, the Time Trading House didn't have his information, and these employees would naturally know it instantly, if they didn't even know this, there was no need for the Time Trading Company to open it.

"Okay, I'll get an account first. "

Ye Tian nodded.

If you trade in a time trading bank, it is very inconvenient to not have an account.

But in the void area, there is only time for the firm to be qualified to establish an account for the customer, so that the customer can rest assured that the property will be put in, and if it is another firm, it is possible that it will be destroyed one day, who dares to put something in?

Of course, incomparably precious things, no one put them into the time firm.

Soon.

Time Firm handled the account for Ye Tian and obtained a special card, which was very extraordinary, using a very powerful rule, unable to change his material and internal information........ ，

It must have something to do with the Eternal Master, otherwise it wouldn't have such a characteristic.

"Does the Time Merchant have the Empty Sea Gravel, the Time River Bead, and the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Not yet!" the female employee shook her head and said, "However, 300 million eternal years ago, the Time Merchant House in Beihe auctioned a grain of hollow sea gravel, and 600 million eternal years ago auctioned a time river pearl in the Ancient Domain Sea, as for the ancient leaves of time and space, the earliest time to appear was 1.8 billion years ago, and no one auctioned it. "

"If there is news of these three treasures, I hope the Time Firm can notify me. "

Ye Tian said.

"No problem, only the guest handles the message reminder business, and we will notify the customer in time. "

The female employee said.

"Yes. "

Ye Tian immediately handled this business, and then left the Time Trading Bank.

After all, without these three treasures, there was no point in him staying in the Time Firm.

So, he left the Time Firm.

......

After returning, Ye Tian continued to retreat and cultivate, contemplating the blood tissue of the supreme legendary body.

No matter what, he still has to comprehend the Supreme Legend, and only if he has enough understanding and perception of the Supreme Legend, in the future, when he obtains the Time River Pearl, the Konghai Gravel, and the 0.9 leaves of the Time and Space Ancient, can he condense the Supreme Legend.

Otherwise, if you don't have a deep understanding, even if you get those three treasures, there is no way to condense the supreme legendary body.

In addition, Ye Tian continued to cultivate the Eternal Dao, striving to cultivate a large number of Eternal Dao to the Legendary level as soon as possible.

Moreover, the Heaven and Earth of Will Rules can still continue to improve, although the improvement is slow, but it is also a way to improve strength.

Not only that, but the will and rule perception, and the control of time can continue to improve, which is not affected by the cultivation realm.

After a long time, it was about 3 million eternal years.

On this day, the Time Firm sent a message to Ye Tian.

When Ye Tian saw this message, his expression immediately became overjoyed.

There's time for the news of Hezhu!_
